# mailgun_send_alert (Data Source)

Fetches a Mailgun send alert by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Fetch a specific send alert by name
data "mailgun_send_alert" "example" {
  name = "high-bounce-rate-alert"
}

# Use the alert data
output "alert_metric" {
  value = data.mailgun_send_alert.example.metric
}

output "alert_limit" {
  value = data.mailgun_send_alert.example.limit
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the alert to fetch.

### Read-Only

- `account_group` (String) The group this account belongs to.
- `alert_channels` (List of String) A list of alert channels to notify.
- `comparator` (String) The comparison operator.
- `created_at` (String) Timestamp of when the alert was created.
- `description` (String) A description of what the alert does.
- `dimension` (String) The dimension to apply to the metric.
- `filters` (Attributes List) A list of filters applied to the alert. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--filters))
- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the alert.
- `last_checked` (String) Timestamp of when the alert was last checked.
- `limit` (String) The threshold limit for the alert.
- `metric` (String) The metric being monitored.
- `parent_account_id` (String) The parent account ID.
- `period` (String) The time period for the metric aggregation.
- `subaccount_id` (String) The subaccount ID this alert belongs to.
- `updated_at` (String) Timestamp of when the alert was last updated.

<a id="nestedatt--filters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `filters`

Read-Only:

- `comparator` (String) The comparison operator for the filter.
- `dimension` (String) The dimension to filter by.
- `values` (List of String) The dimension values to apply to filter.
